title: Agentic Workspace Evaluation Closure Authority
description: Issue closeout split between present-tense implementation proof and longitudinal evaluation.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying closeout authorization under the evaluation split.

longitudinal_evaluation.description: Whether remaining future uncertainty is backed by a valid evaluation.

evaluation_admission.description: How the longitudinal evaluation was admitted for closure authorization.

issue_closure_authorized.description: Whether issue closure may be claimed under the split proof/evaluation rule.
